component.name: ReShade Linux
component.summary: Install ReShade for Wine and Proton games on Linux

description.p: Download ReShade and shader repositories, then link them into any Windows game running under Wine or Proton on Linux. Provides automatic Steam game detection, per-game shader selection, and a graphical or terminal UI.

ul.li: Automatic Steam library scanning and game detection
PE import table analysis to pick the correct DLL override
Per-game shader selection from a curated repository catalog
Batch update for all installed games at once

description.p: Route AppImage startup through the GUI wrapper, harden backend and dependency validation, and verify ReShade downloads more strictly before install.
Add "Update all installed games" option in the install/uninstall dialog. Fix shader compilation failures when a repo containing shared .fxh headers was not selected.
Diagnostics and test helpers now include explicit ShellCheck hints for clean repository-wide analysis.
Single-source versioning, rich shader repository descriptions, expanded to 18 curated repos, and improved game detection.
